warnings: MET observes EVL handoffs and records materialization observations only. EVL is the canonical owner; this artifact does not say EVL accepted, adopted, or approved any candidate.
materialization_observation values are derived from artifact-backed reads of EVL/REP/LIN artifacts. Absence of a confirming artifact is recorded as 'none_observed', not as 'rejected'.
suggested_eval_shape is a recommendation only; final shape is EVL's to set.
failure_prevented: EVL bottleneck staying invisible because per-candidate handoff signals were not tracked; readiness evidence going unobserved; missing-evidence states being read as EVL passivity.
signal_improved: Each eval candidate has a tracked handoff signal with readiness_evidence_available, missing_readiness_evidence, suggested_eval_shape, and a materialization_observation derived from artifact-backed reads.

missing_readiness_evidence: REP per-dimension replay status fields including long_horizon and distribution_shift
handoff_items.suggested_eval_shape: replay_consistency eval with long_horizon dimension required; absent dimension surfaces as warn.
handoff_items.next_recommended_input: Forward HOH-EVC-EVL-LONG-HORIZON-REPLAY to EVL; pair with HR-REP-DIM-LONG-HORIZON for REP.
handoff_items.failure_prevented: Long-horizon replay candidate handoff remaining invisible to EVL with no readiness evidence catalogued.
handoff_items.signal_improved: EVL has a named handoff signal with readiness evidence and missing-evidence breakdown.

missing_readiness_evidence: Full certification evidence set artifact list
handoff_items.suggested_eval_shape: evidence_coverage eval enumerating required certification inputs and per-input present/partial/missing.
handoff_items.next_recommended_input: Forward HOH-EVC-EVL-FULL-CERT-SET to EVL alongside POL-SEL-CERT-COMPLETENESS for SEL.
handoff_items.failure_prevented: Certification evidence handoff staying implicit with EVL bottleneck unaddressed.
handoff_items.signal_improved: EVL has a named handoff signal with explicit missing-evidence list.

missing_readiness_evidence: REP per-dimension status fields: short_horizon, long_horizon, distribution_shift
handoff_items.suggested_eval_shape: evidence_coverage eval with per-dimension presence; missing dimension surfaces as warn.
handoff_items.failure_prevented: REP per-dimension handoff being invisible to EVL.
handoff_items.signal_improved: EVL has a tracked handoff signal targeting REP.

handoff_items.suggested_eval_shape: schema_conformance eval requiring consumed_ratio and budget_status as first-class fields.
handoff_items.signal_improved: EVL has a tracked handoff signal targeting SLO.

handoff_items.suggested_eval_shape: trace_completeness eval enumerating required edges with per-edge status.
handoff_items.signal_improved: EVL has a tracked handoff signal targeting LIN.

missing_readiness_evidence: EVL acceptance condition asserting dashboard-truth invariant
handoff_items.suggested_eval_shape: dashboard_truth eval asserting no fake-zero substitution and no banned authority vocabulary.
handoff_items.signal_improved: EVL has a tracked handoff signal for the dashboard-truth invariant.
